name: AddEvent
description: AddEvent — Add-to-calendar API and service for embedding event save buttons for Google, Apple, Outlook, and Office 365.

seo.title: AddEvent — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: AddEvent: AddEvent — Add-to-calendar API and service for embedding event save buttons for Google, Apple, Outlook, and Office 365.

when_to_use: Add-to-calendar button for event confirmation emails
Embed calendar save links in marketing campaigns
Multi-platform calendar sync for webinar invites
iCal feed generation for subscription event calendars
One-click calendar add for product launch events

pros: Simple add-to-calendar button drops in fast
cons: Branding only removes on paid tiers
Analytics are basic compared to marketing tools
No native webhooks for some plans
review.verdict: The pragmatic choice when you just need reliable add-to-calendar links without building calendar format logic yourself.
review.best_for: Marketing teams and event sites adding calendar invites without writing ICS parsers
review.not_for: Apps needing two-way calendar sync or deep scheduling logic

lock_in.reason: Standard iCal/Google URLs; easy to switch add-to-calendar tools

developer_experience.reason: Embed snippets and REST API, simple but focused
